rationale: Response presents speculation as established fact (inductive leap from 3 successful projects to 'any future project should succeed') and fails to surface obvious counter-evidence — it analyses only winners, ignoring failed/stalled formalisation efforts, which is the textbook survivorship bias the prompt implicitly tests.
rubric_evidence: These four practices appear in every successful project. Therefore, any future formalisation project that adopts this methodology should succeed.
